description: Apply shared auth timeout policy across login and status surfaces.

userStories.title: Persist shared auth timeout policy
userStories.description: As a platform owner, I want one shared auth timeout policy so dependent flows use the same rules.
acceptanceCriteria: Shared auth timeout policy exists in one reusable location

userStories.title: Apply timeout policy to login flow
userStories.description: As a user, I want login timeout handling to reuse shared policy so behavior stays consistent.
acceptanceCriteria: Login flow reads shared auth timeout policy

userStories.title: Show timeout status badge
userStories.description: As a user, I want a timeout status badge so I can see when auth policy is active.
acceptanceCriteria: Status badge reflects timeout policy state
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Log timeout audit events
userStories.description: As an operator, I want audit events for timeout enforcement so support can trace auth failures.
